productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Men Solid White Shorts
description: CompositionWhite shorts made of 100% cotton, has two pockets on the sides, two buttoned flap pockets on the front legs, two patch pockets on the back, a fabric belt in black and grey, wide waistband elasticated on the back, removable elastic, and has a button and zipper closure in the front FittingCustomWash careMachine wash cold inside out with like colours using a mild detergentRemove all detachable accessories bofore washingDo not tumble dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorAn all-essential apparel in your little one's wardrobe, this pair of white shorts is created using durable soft cotton that offers exemplary comfort. The removable elastic from the waistband allows you to customise the Fit and helps your fast growing boy fit into it for months on end. A perfect wear for weekends.
